{{Quote|Can't you see I'm auditioning? This is my shot at the big time. I can't risk screwing it up by talking to you.|Lyn to [[Revan/Legends|Revan]]|translated=1|<ref name="KOTOR">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''</ref>}}
'''Lyn Sekla''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] yellow [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] who wanted desperately to get off [[Taris/Legends|Taris]]. In [[3956 BBY]], she heard that [[Bib Surool]] of the [[Starlight Entertainers]] was stuck on Taris due to the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] quarantine, and auditioned for him as a dancer. [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] ensured her that he could be a good partner for her audition, and helped her to be hired.<ref name="KOTOR" />

==Behind the scenes==
If the player's persuade skill is high enough, then they can persuade her to be her partner. If the player succeeds then she is hired; however, the player can also purposely ruin the audition by running around her in circles or falling down.

There are 3 dances, each with 3 choices:

Safe: Revan is careful, dancing off a bit to the side. This always works, and Lyn is guaranteed a job.

Bold: Revan dances close to Lyn, be it to the side, in front or behind. Success of each dance is 50-50.

Ruin: Revan spoils Lyn's chance, like her last 2 partners.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' {{1st}}
